utility_evaluation.REASONING: First, count the number of items in the required format: 1) health_coverage, 2) property_coverage, 3) travel_coverage, 4) additional_services, 5) total_budget — total of 5 items. Then, check the final coverage plan: it contains health_coverage (with both physical and mental health specified and costs), property_coverage (home/contents and costs), travel_coverage (plan and costs), additional_services (service and costs), and total_budget (monthly and annual breakdown). All items are present and include the necessary details specified in the required format.
